reading.title: Reading: Shopping list
reading.passage: I need a small red bag and a big blue box. I also want two white pens and three green cards. The shop has tiny boxes too, but I prefer the wide ones.

questions.question: The writer wants a small red bag.
How many pens does the writer want?

reading.title: Reading: Lost items
reading.passage: This is my key, and these are my glasses. I can't find my phone. These tickets are for tomorrow's concert. Is this your wallet? These are not my cards.

questions.question: The tickets are for today's concert.
questions.explanation: Vé là cho buổi hòa nhạc "tomorrow", không phải hôm nay.
